title: Tom's Weekend
text:
Tom is a student. He studies at a high school. On weekdays, he wakes up early, but on weekends, he wakes up at 9:00. He feels happy because he does not go to school.

On Saturday morning, Tom eats breakfast with his family. He usually eats eggs, bread, and fruit. After breakfast, he plays computer games or watches videos.

In the afternoon, he goes out with his friends. They walk in the park or play football. Tom likes spending time with his friends.

In the evening, he has dinner with his family. After dinner, he watches a movie or listens to music. On Sunday, he sometimes studies for his lessons.

Tom goes to bed at 11:00 on weekends. He enjoys his weekend and feels relaxed before Monday.

questions.question: What time does Tom wake up on weekends?
What does Tom do after breakfast?
options: He plays games or watches videos

questions.question: What does Tom do in the afternoon?
What does Tom sometimes do on Sunday?
Tom goes to school on weekends.
